title: atractocarpus rotundifolius
intro: Atractocarpus rotundifolius, also known as the 'Tetradenia' or 'Snake Wood', is a plant species native to Australia and New Guinea, belonging to the family Rutaceae. The medicinal properties of Atractocarpus rotundifolius include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it useful in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and provide relief from skin irritations. Atractocarpus rotundifolius is used in herbal preparations such as infusions, decoctions, and topical creams to harness its medicinal properties.
